reference: I had pain in my left buttock and the pain extended to my thigh. Blood tests were done, and I tested positive for Human Leukocyte Antigen B27. I was prescribed Sulfasalazine and Voveran by the doctors. After seven days, the pain has reduced a lot, but I am still not able to walk properly. How much time will it take for me to become normal?
text: I had pain in my left buttock, and the pain extended to my back. Blood tests were done, and I tested positive for human leukocyte antigen B twenty seven. I was prescribed solbucazoline and vovoran by the doctors. After seven days, the pain has reduced a lot, but I am still not able to walk properly. How much time would it take for me to become normal?
